text.title: Google Ads Account Foundations Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing the methodology applied to a realistic scenario, including the produced artefact.

example.description: Faion SaaS account: Search + Shopping (no PMax yet, only 18 conv/mo). 6 ad groups across brand + generic. 3 extension types. Roles admin + manager.
example.note: Conversion tracking live; PMax deferred (<30 conv/mo); 1-theme ad groups; 3 extensions; billing roles scoped.
